name: The Supremacy Sun
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｔｈｅ ｓｕｐｒｅｍａｃｙ ＳＵＮ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ・スプレマシー・サン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned, except by its own effect. After this face-up card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, during the Standby Phase of the next turn: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon this card from the Graveyard.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned, except by its own effect. After this face-up card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, during the Standby Phase of the next turn: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon this card from the Graveyard.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned, except by its own effect. After this face-up card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, during the Standby Phase of the next turn: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon this card from the Graveyard.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Cannot be Special Summoned except by a specific method
Cannot be Special Summoned from the hand
Cannot be Special Summoned from the Deck
Cannot be Special Summoned from the Spell & Trap Zone
Cannot be Special Summoned while banished
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
